## Type
- [ ] Feature

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] CI is green (backend lint + tests, frontend typecheck + build)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] PHI/audit impact considered (does this touch patient data?)
- [ ] Docs / ADRs updated if architecture or contracts changed
